protocol.scope: fixed dev-only paired stability gate; no stress, formal validation, or test
protocol.proposal_definition: causal sliding window whose action histogram contains exactly window/action_dim occurrences of every action
protocol.proposal_semantics: deterministic balanced-window structural refresh; not a neural EC output and not guaranteed sparse
protocol.context_update: at an active proposal, adopt current causal PFC base_context; otherwise retain previous context
protocol.post_result_rule: do not change architecture, seeds, sample count, or gates after reading results
